title: Cambridge University Women's Boat Club
body: Cambridge University Women's Boat Club (CUWBC) was the rowing club for women at the University of Cambridge. CUWBC fielded both a lightweight eight that races against Oxford at the Henley Boat Races, and two openweight eights that race at the Women's Boat Race.  In April 2020 it was agreed that the club would be combined with the men's club CUBC and the lightweight men's club CULRC.
